query.original: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?
query.used: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?

retrieved_nodes.preview: In Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition, the Action Surge feature allows a character to take one additional action on their turn, in addition to their regular action and any bonus action. However, once Acti

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules. The rules state that when using Action Surge to take an additional action, you can only cast one leveled spell (with a casting time of 1 action) and one bonus action spell, but not two leveled spells in the same turn.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is relevant to the user query but contains incorrect information regarding the use of Action Surge and casting leveled spells. It misinterprets the rules, leading to a misunderstanding of what is allowed.
